Great Christmas
Join us here at The Woolpack Sopley for our newest
sharing experience this Christmas period
Served family style with roast turkey, roast beef and
pork belly accompanied by panfried sprouts with
bacon, cauliflower cheese, roasted carrots, honey
roasted parsnips, red wine jus and our signature
giant yorkshire puddings!
Followed by your choice of Christmas pudding and
brandy sauce to share or apple pie and custard to
share!
You will also get included a complimentary bottle of
house wine per four people
This menu will need to be prebooked to join us for a
festive feast! Deposits required.
£35 PP MİN 4 PEOPLE
